invalidation.zh: 失效条件：价格跌破$3250（支撑位），或费率Z值转正（空头压力缓解）。
invalidation.en: Invalidation condition: price breaks below $3250 (support level), or funding Z-score turns positive (short pressure eases).

invalidation.zh: 失效条件：价格跌破$0.135（基于ATR 0.0013设置），或费率Z值转正（空头压力缓解）。
invalidation.en: Invalidation condition: price breaks below $0.135 (based on ATR 0.0013), or funding Z-score turns positive (short pressure eases).

invalidation.zh: 失效条件：价格跌破$140（基于ATR 0.9829设置），或费率Z值转正（空头压力缓解）。
invalidation.en: Invalidation condition: price breaks below $140 (based on ATR 0.9829), or funding Z-score turns positive (short pressure eases).
